item.title: 新的 NadMesh 僵尸网络寻找公开的 AI 服务以获取云密钥和 Kubernetes 令牌
item.summary: A Go botnet called NadMesh turned up in early July hunting exposed AI services, and the operator's own dashboard claims 3,811 unique AWS keys. A Shodan harvester keeps the scan queue stocked with ComfyUI, Ollama, n8n, Open WebUI, Langflow, and Gradio: the image generators, local model runners, and workflow builders tha
